---
id: update-report
title: 'Update report'
description: 'As long as a report is not generated, the values can be updated'
sidebar_label: 'Update report'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'patch api-method'
info_path: theolive/api/reports/reports
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Update report'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'patch'} path={'/{id}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

As long as a report is not generated, the values can be updated

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'} children={'Request'}></Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{ name: 'id', in: 'path', description: 'ID of report to update', schema: { type: 'string' }, required: true }]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={'Body'}
  body={{
    content: {
      'application/json': {
        schema: {
          type: 'object',
          properties: {
            name: { type: 'string', description: 'Name of the report' },
            start: {
              type: 'string',
              description: 'Start time of the report in ISO 8601 format. Example: 2022-08-23T10:00:00.000Z. Timestamps should be in UTC!',
            },
            end: {
              type: 'string',
              description: 'End time of the report in ISO 8601 format. Example: 2022-08-23T10:00:00.000Z. Timestamps should be in UTC!',
            },
            channelIds: { type: 'array', description: 'List of channel IDs which should be included in the report', items: { type: 'string' } },
            client_id: { type: 'string', description: 'Optional client ID that can be set' },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    '200': {
      description: '200',
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          examples: {
            Result: {
              value:
                '{\n  "reportId": "id-of-report",\n    "channelIds": [\n        "channel-id"\n    ],\n    "end": "end-datetime",\n    "name": "name-report",\n    "start": "start-datetime"\n}',
            },
          },
          schema: {
            type: 'object',
            properties: {
              reportId: { type: 'string', example: 'id-of-report' },
              channelIds: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', example: 'channel-id' } },
              end: { type: 'string', example: 'end-datetime' },
              name: { type: 'string', example: 'name-report' },
              start: { type: 'string', example: 'start-datetime' },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
    '400': {
      description: '400',
      content: { 'application/json': { examples: { Result: { value: '{}' } }, schema: { type: 'object', properties: {} } } },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
